libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Preserve/add test JVM args `--add-opens=java.base/java.lang=ALL-UNNAMED` when generating OGNL tests, because existing coverage exercises OGNL reflective access internals on JDK 9+. Do not set `ognl.security.manager` globally; if security-manager-specific paths are tested, set and restore that system property inside the individual test.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Javassist expression compilation is a normal OGNL path and is already a transitive dependency of `ognl:ognl:3.3.5`; native-image/runtime behavior may still need conditional assertions.
SecurityManager APIs are deprecated/removed on newer JDKs, so tests touching OGNL security-manager paths may be JDK-sensitive even with setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL is an in-process expression/property-access library with Javassist supplied transitively; no extra dependency or Docker service is needed, but meaningful reflective-access coverage on modern JDKs needs the existing JVM module-opening setup preserved.
